title.v: Cập nhật thông tin bảo hiểm, công đoàn
title.e: Employee Insurance and Union Due Information Input

subTitle.v: Cập nhật thông tin bảo hiểm xã hội, y tế, thất nghiệp, kinh phí công đoàn...
subTitle.e: Input Social Insurance, Health Insurance, Unemployment Insurance and Union Due Information...

query.text:
declare @key nvarchar(4000), @join nvarchar(4000), @field nvarchar(4000), @bp_ref varchar(128) declare @male nvarchar(32), @female nvarchar(32), @f1 varchar(32), @f2 varchar(32), @f3 varchar(32) select @f1 = 'ten_bp', @f2 = 'ten_vtr', @f3 = 'ten_ttnv', @bp_ref = '', @join = '', @key = '' if @@language <> 'v' select @f1 = @f1 + '2', @f2 = @f2 + '2', @f3 = @f3 + '2'
if (@ma_bp <> '') select @bp_ref = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp select @male = case when @@language = 'v' then name else name2 end from hrdirinfo where code = '1' and type = 'Gender' select @female = case when @@language = 'v' then name else name2 end from hrdirinfo where code = '2' and type = 'Gender' select @field = 'stt_rec, a.stt, rtrim(ma_nv) ma_nv, replace(rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + rtrim(ten_nv), '''', '''''''') ho_ten,' select @field = @field + 'case gioi_tinh when ''1'' then N''' + replace(rtrim(@male), '''', '''''') + ''' else N''' + replace(rtrim(@female), '''', '''''') + ''' end ten_gt,' select @field = @field + 'ngay_sinh, ' + @f1 + ', ' + @f2 + ', ' + @f3 + ''
select @join = 'left join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp left join hrvt d on a.vi_tri = d.ma_vtr left join hrdmttnv e on a.tinh_trang_nv = e.ma_ttnv'
if (@ngay_tu is not null) set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ngay_vao >= ''' + convert(char(8), @ngay_tu, 112) + '''' if (@ngay_den is not null) set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ngay_vao <= ''' + convert(char(8), @ngay_den, 112) + ''''
if (@ma_nv <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.ma_nv = ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_nv), '''', '''''') + '''' if (@ma_bp <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.bp_ref like ''' + replace(rtrim(@bp_ref), '''', '''''') + '%''' if (@vi_tri <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.vi_tri = ''' + replace(rtrim(@vi_tri), '''', '''''') + '''' if (@ma_bac <> '') set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'a.bac_quan_ly = ''' + replace(rtrim(@ma_bac), '''', '''''') + '''' if (@empty <> 0) set @key = @key + case @key when '' then '' else ' and ' end + 'not exists(select 1 from hrttbh f where a.stt_rec = f.stt_rec)'
declare @k1 varchar(1024), @k2 varchar(1024) select @k1 = stuff(@@firstItem, len(@@firstItem) - 12, 0, ' '), @k2 = stuff(@@lastItem, len(@@lastItem) - 12, 0, ' ') exec FastBusiness$HRM$EmployeeInformation$Finding @@table, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @k1, @k2, @key, @join, 'rtrim(ma_nv) + '' '' + stt_rec', @field, 'a.ma_nv', '@@sysDatabaseName', @@admin, @@userID
